titleStmt.title: SII 22.55: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 55. (A.R. No. 55 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM. BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KŌNĒRINMAIKOṆḌĀN (?)—9th YEAR AND 100th DAY.

summary.p: This seems to register the grant of 2 pieces of land, one at Vīraśōḻanallūr and the other at Virudarājabhayaṅkaranallūr and measuring together 23(1/2) [vēli] in extent, to the temple of Tirumaiyānamuḍaiyār at Tirukkaḍavūr, by order of the king. Mention is made of a flower garden called the “Rājādhirājaṉ tirunandavanam” which was to be formed out of one of these lands after its reclamation from sandy mounds. The record is left incomplete towards the end. A land settlement made in the 16th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa is referred to in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟil prasātam
ceytaruḷi svasti śrī . tirupuvaṉacca
kkaravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jaya
ṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭup pirama
tecam tirukkaṭavūr tirumaiyāṉamuṭaiyār koyil
tevakaṉmikkum ci mākecurakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkuku
ṟkkum tevatāṉa—
m Iṟaiyiliyāyt tirunantavaṉam Āka Ivvūṟ piṭākai
viracoḻanallūril maṇṇu maṇaṟkuṉṟum Āṉa nilatti
lum kuḻi 3 10 kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku patiṉ Āṟā
vatu Aḷanta kaṇakkuppaṭi Ittevaṟku tirunaṉtavaṉam Āy niṅkalāṉa
nilattum tiyākavalli toppum naṉtavaṉamum Āṉa nilattu naṉtavaṉa
m Āka niṟkiṟa nilam nikki nikkiṉinṟa nilamum piṭākai virutarāyapayaṅka ranal
lūril teṉkūṭu Eḻuntu maṇṇum maṇaṟkuṉṟumāy nilaṉ puraṇilai
kku Eṉṟu varukiṟa nilamumāy taramiliyāṉaṉilattu Irācātirācaṉ
tiru naṉtavaṉam Ākac ceykiṟa nilattukku Ūṟkaṇakku Āyirattu Aiñ
ñūṟṟuvappiriyaṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi viracoḻa nallūril tiyā
kavalli toppu ḻuntūr vatikku ki
ḻakku Irācentiracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakkumutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭā
m catirattum Iraṇṭām kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām catirattum ci māṟkeṇṭa yava
tikku kiḻakku Irācentira coḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭā
m catirattum Iraṇṭām kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām catirattum palapaḻam
paṭiye tiyākavalli naṉtavaṉamāy niṟkum nilam 2 10ya nikki nikki nilam 7iyum virutarāya
payaṅkaranallūril cimāṟkaṇṭeyavatikku kiḻakku Irācentiracoḻa vāykkā
lukkut teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām catirattum Iraṇṭām kaṇ
ṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām catirattum muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām catirattu
m nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām catirattum maṇṇum maṇaṟkuṉṟum ku
ṉṟukāṭumāy nilaṉ pāṇi paṉaṅkāṭu Eṉṟu varukiṟa nilam 10 4�- li Āka
nilam 2 10 m Āka nilam Irupattu muṉṟarai Iṉṉilam Irupattu muṉṟarai mu
ṉṉuṭaiyārum Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāna ṉilamum IṟaikaṭṭukkuStops here incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 22.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
